subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of holiness which have been sent down in truth from the presence of the Mighty, the All-Wise, and through them hath mercy descended from the heaven of My Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات القدس قد نزلت بالحق من لدن عزیز حکیم و بها نزلت الرحمه من سماء اسمی
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
